title: Tactics: Zwischenzug (Intermediate Move)
summary: Master the powerful Zwischenzug - inserting a threat before the expected recapture.
description: Zwischenzug (German for 'intermediate move') is when instead of recapturing a piece, you first make another threat that forces the opponent to respond. This often leads to winning material or delivering checkmate. This is a signature GM-level tactical weapon.
objectives: Recognize positions where Zwischenzug is possible
Learn to look for intermediate moves before recapturing
Understand how Zwischenzug changes the evaluation
Master the psychology of the Zwischenzug
plans: Before recapturing, ask: 'Can I make a threat first?'
Look for checks or threats that can't be ignored
The Zwischenzug often makes the recapture impossible
commonMistakes: Don't play the expected recapture when an intermediate move might be better
Always calculate whether your Zwischenzug can be defended
Sometimes the opponent can also play Zwischenzug!
completionTitle: Adding extra dimensions to your tactics
completionSummary: You've learned to use Zwischenzug to create powerful tactical surprises.

steps.title: Control the center
steps.hint: Push the king pawn two squares.

steps.title: Black captures
steps.coaching: Now we can capture back, but let's think about a Zwischenzug first.

steps.title: The Zwischenzug!
steps.instruction: Move Ng5! This is the Zwischenzug - we threaten something before recapturing!
steps.coaching: Instead of capturing on d4, we attack f7! Black must deal with this threat.
steps.hint: Move the knight to g5 - attacking f7!

steps.title: Black defends f7
steps.instruction: Black pushes d5, attacking the knight.
steps.coaching: Black defends f7 by attacking our knight. But now we can capture on d4 safely!

steps.title: Now we capture
steps.instruction: Now capture on d4! Black can't recapture effectively.
steps.hint: Capture on d4 with the c-pawn.

steps.title: Black develops
steps.instruction: Black develops the bishop to e6.

steps.title: Win material
steps.instruction: Capture on e6! We've won a pawn through the Zwischenzug.
steps.hint: Capture on e6 with the bishop.
